headline: The Bull Case For Southern (SO) Could Change Following Q1 Beat And FERC Dam Upgrade Approval
summary: In April 2026, The Southern Company reported first-quarter 2026 results showing sales of US$8,061 million and revenue of US$8,397 million, with net income of US$1,356 million and essentially flat earnings per share versus a year earlier. Alongside these results, Southern obtained Federal Energy Regulatory Commission approval to begin the Oliver Dam spillway gate and hoist replacement project, reinforcing its focus on long-term system reliability and regulatory compliance. We’ll now examine...
